completion_reason: The approved Phase 0B local-only autonomous scope is complete: Phase 0A baseline recorded, local single-admin gate added, protected Radar Task UI added, and final deterministic release smoke/docs completed. Remaining provider/deployment/production-auth work is outside the approved autonomous scope and human-gated.

approved_scope.name: Phase 0B local backfill
allowed: Implement a local-only single-admin password gate and session cookie.
Implement protected Radar Task list/create/detail/edit/delete UI and mock Run Scan control.
Add final local smoke/docs for the approved Phase 0B flow.
human_gated: Public deployment, CI/CD, DNS, store listing, or commercial release.
Paid provider setup, real external accounts, budgets, or real secrets.
Multi-user ownership, billing, telemetry, cron, or email.
